calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for heariing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq. appeared with petitioner Heather Black, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Exene Black, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $25,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $6,250.00.
Costs - $330.00.

The net balance of $18,420.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 2100 Fillmore Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Provide Copies Of Documents Produced By Nonparty Chao'S Brother Electric In Response To Deposition Subpoena, And For A Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Andrew Westley, Esq. (415-362-2817), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Irene McGee
Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq. (415-533-0735), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Heather Black

Ruling:
After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Plaintiff's motion to provide copies of documents produced by non-party Chao's Brother Electric in response to deposition subpoena is moot as the documents were produced after the filing of the motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $370 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. = Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
